ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] the night when it covers with darkness,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the night when it falls still!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muhammad], nor has He detested [you].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Your Lord ˹O Prophet˺ has not abandoned you, nor has He become hateful ˹of you˺.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And the next life is certainly far better for you than this one.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And ˹surely˺ your Lord will give so much to you that you will be pleased.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Did He not find you an orphan and give [you] refuge?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Did He not find you as an orphan then shelter you?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And He found you lost and guided [you],
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Did He not find you unguided then guide you?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And did He not find you needy then satisfy your needs?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So do not oppress the orphan,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And as for the petitioner, do not repel [him].
But as for the favor of your Lord, report [it].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And proclaim the blessings of your Lord.
